Title: Create Queue Dashboard UI

Description:
Build the main queue dashboard that displays active queue entries, their status, and actions for staff to manage visitors.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Dashboard shows list of queue entries sorted by arrival time.
- Each entry displays name, serviceType, status, position, and timestamp.
- Actions available: mark In Service, Complete, Edit, Delete.

Priority: P1
Labels: frontend, ui, P1

Checklist:
- [ ] Design dashboard layout
- [ ] Implement server data fetching
- [ ] Implement action buttons and optimistic UI updates
- [ ] Add responsive styles
